channel.title: Problem-Solving Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem-Solving Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: beer_gm_col_cart.pdf
item.description: The Beer Game, Collusion and Cartels, Numeric Example.

item.title: inf_asym_tra_prc.pdf
item.description: Asymmetric Information, Numeric Example on Comparative Advantage, Transfer Pricing, Numeric Example on Transfer Pricing.

item.title: mkt_elstic_srpl.pdf
item.description: Market Definition, Elasticities, Supply and Demand, Surplus, Numeric Example.

item.title: nw_ext_dmnd_con.pdf
item.description: Network Externalities, Dynamic Demand and Elasticities, Numeric Examples.

item.title: prc_disc_and_tar.pdf
item.description: Conditions for Applying Price Discrimination, Perfect Price Discrimination, Consumer Self-Selection, Pricing to Observable Market Segments, Two part Tariff: Definition and Calculations, Numeric Examples.

item.title: pro_and_cost_con.pdf
item.description: The Production Function, Economic Cost and User Cost of Capital, Cost concepts, Economies of Scale and Scope, Learning Curve Effects, Numeric Examples.

item.title: surplus_anal_gov.pdf
item.description: Review of Consumer and Producer Surplus, Government Intervention, Deadweight Loss and Numeric Examples.

item.title: the_bsc_game_thy.pdf
item.description: Game Theory Definitions, The Cournot Model, The Stackelberg Model, The Bertrand Model, Numeric Examples.

item.title: time_uncrtn_mkt.pdf
item.description: Basics of Present Value, Uncertainty and Risk Aversion, Option Value, Market Power Models, Numeric Examples.
